archived.title: Fix mid-run save: persist run_state incrementally during run
archived.notes: Fixed: _do_autosave() now calls save_run_state(run_snapshot) when run is active. run_snapshot duplicates run dict and adds biome/card_index keys required by save system validator. Also removed pacing recovery (+5 HP when life<20) per director q-20260412-005.
